content: User asked to fix Slack/Codex adapter so .kagura is not generated under user workspaces. In /Users/innei/git/innei-repo/slack-cc-bot, changed Codex prompt/runtime handling to use per-execution temp paths under os.tmpdir()/kagura/codex-cli for memory ops and generated artifacts, and updated adapter tests to assert workspace .kagura is not created. Verified with pnpm --dir apps/kagura exec vitest run tests/codex-cli-adapter.test.ts and pnpm --dir apps/kagura typecheck.

During the .kagura fix, full apps/kagura test command accidentally ran the full suite and failed only on unrelated better-sqlite3 Node ABI mismatch tests; the targeted Codex adapter test file passed. slack-cc-bot already had unrelated dirty files before the change: .claude/skills/writing-live-e2e-tests/SKILL.md and apps/kagura/src/e2e/live/run-codex-memory-activity.ts, plus existing edits in adapter/test files.
